hypothesis: For the CNN–GRU–attention model trained on the coarse-grained dataset, the learned polymer-to-surface attention weights quantitatively correspond to physical monomer–surface contact propensities such that, across independent MD test trajectories, the top 20% highest-attention monomers coincide with the top 20% most frequently contacting monomers with at least 75% precision in at least 80% of test systems.
